name: Hypocoliidae
description: Hypocoliidae is a monotypic family of passerine birds found in arid regions of the Middle East and South Asia. The single species is known for its frugivorous diet and sleek grey plumage.

children.name: Hypocolius
children.description: A monotypic genus of passerine bird with affinities to waxwings and silky-flycatchers.

children.name: Hypocolius ampelinus
children.description: The Hypocolius is a sleek, grey passerine with black wingtips and a black mask in males. It inhabits arid scrub and palm groves, feeding primarily on dates and other fruits.
